watermark.valueCandidate: FlexClip free projects carry a watermark, and exceeding Plus-plan limits can also trigger a watermark.
watermark.snippet: FlexClip's watermark article says free-version watermarks cannot be removed and watermarking can also appear when a project exceeds Plus-plan limits.
watermark.sourceTitle: Why is my video watermarked? | FlexClip Help Center

commercialUse.valueCandidate: FlexClip allows Plus/Business subscribers and AI-credit purchasers to use stock resources and AI-generated content commercially.
commercialUse.snippet: FlexClip's commercial-use help says Plus and Business subscribers, as well as AI credit purchasers, can use provided stock resources and AI-generated content commercially.
commercialUse.sourceTitle: Commercial Use Regulations | FlexClip Help Center

commercialUse.valueCandidate: FlexClip free users cannot use stock resources and generated content for commercial use.
commercialUse.snippet: The same commercial-use guidance says free users are not allowed to use FlexClip stock resources or generated content commercially.
commercialUse.sourceTitle: Commercial Use Regulations | FlexClip Help Center

refundCancellation.valueCandidate: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
refundCancellation.snippet: Can I cancel my subscription anytime? Yes, absolutely. Once you cancel your subscription, you will enjoy the benefits of the current plan until the end of your billing cycle. After the end of the billing cycle, you will be downgraded to a free plan.
